stage1_output.Text: Microsoft AI systems are reviewed to identify systems that may have a significant adverse impact on people, organizations, and society, and additional oversight and requirements are applied to those systems.
Review defined Restricted Uses to determine whether the system meets the definition of any Restricted Use.
If it does, document this in the Impact Assessment,
and follow the requirements for the Restricted Use.
Answer prompts in the Impact Assessment template to determine whether the system meets the definition of a Sensitive Use.
If it does, report it to the Office of Responsible AI,
and follow any additional requirements resulting from a Sensitive Uses review.
Review your systems at least annually against the definitions for Sensitive Uses and Restricted Uses.
If there are systems that meet the criteria for Sensitive Uses, report them to the Office of Responsible AI.
If there are systems that meet the criteria for Restricted Uses, notify the Office of Responsible AI.

If there are systems that meet the criteria for Restricted Uses, notify the Office of Responsible AI.

stage3_output.Active_Recovered_Text: Microsoft AI systems are reviewed to identify systems that may have a significant adverse impact on people, organizations, and society, and additional oversight and requirements are applied to those systems.
All AI systems APPLY TO this requirement.
The Reviewer SHALL review defined Restricted Uses to determine whether the system meets the definition of any Restricted Use.
If this is the case, The Reviewer SHALL document this in the Impact Assessment, and the requirements for the Restricted Use FOLLOW THE REQUIREMENTS FOR THE RESTRICTED USE.
The requirements for the Restricted Use SHALL follow the requirements for the Restricted Use.
The Reviewer SHALL answer prompts in the Impact Assessment template to determine whether the system meets the definition of a Sensitive Use.

If this is the case, The Reviewer SHALL report the system to the Office of Responsible AI, and any additional requirements resulting from a Sensitive Uses review FOLLOW ANY ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS RESULTING FROM A SENSITIVE USES REVIEW.
Any additional requirements resulting from a Sensitive Uses review SHALL follow any additional requirements resulting from a Sensitive Uses review.

If there are systems that meet the criteria for Sensitive Uses, The Reviewer SHALL report that to the Office of Responsible AI.
If there are systems that meet the criteria for Restricted Uses, The Reviewer SHALL notify the Office of Responsible AI.
